name: AgentScore
description: AgentScore schema from Palo Alto Networks Autonomous DEM API

timestamp.description: Time bucket for the aggregated score.

user_id.description: User identifier associated with the agent.

site_name.description: Site name where the agent is located.

overall_score.description: Overall experience score for this agent.

endpoint_score.description: Endpoint hardware and software health score.

cpu_usage_pct.description: CPU usage percentage on the endpoint.

memory_usage_pct.description: Memory usage percentage on the endpoint.

sample_count.description: Number of measurement samples in this time bucket.
